form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when she got back too far over 365m at Nowra. Prior to that won by 2 lengths at this track (19.53) beating Jet's Digger in a Grade 5 on December 9. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ordinary effort last start when she got back too far over 365m at Nowra. Prior to that won by 2 lengths at this track (19.53) beating Jet's Digger in a Grade 5 on December 9. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (16.38) at The Gardens in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 7 lengths. Box stats strong with three wins and two placings from seven starts. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (19.46) over 340m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when second (19.48) over 340m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (19.64) over 340m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.59) when sixth over 520m at Wentworth Park in a Mix 1/2/3. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Not going well enough to figure in this.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 365m at Nowra beaten 6 lengths (21.32) behind Mount Barker in a Grade 5 on March 2. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.
